value.stringValue: שלום רב בקשתך התקבלה זמן טיפול בבקשה הינו עד 14 ימי עבודה. בברכה, אסותא
פנייתך התקבלה, ניצור עמך קשר תוך 2 ימי עסקים. בברכה, אסותא

decisions.description: כל פנייה שנפתחת למטופל 360 תקושר לפניית 360
decisions.name: Is_Case_Is_An_Assuta_360_Case
decisions.label: Is Case Is An Assuta 360 Case?

rules.name: Yes_Case_Is_An_Assuta_360_Case
rules.label: Yes- Case Is An Assuta 360 Case

decisions.name: Is_Case_Record_Type_Medical_staff
decisions.label: Is Case Record Type- Medical staff ?

decisions.name: Is_Shikum_Bait_Without_Doc_Authorization
decisions.label: Is Shikum Bait Without Doc Authorization?

rules.name: Yes_Shikum_Bait_Without_Doc_Authorization
rules.label: Yes- Shikum Bait Without Doc Authorization

decisions.name: Is_There_A_Relevant_Parent_Case
decisions.label: Is There A Relevant Parent Case?

rules.name: Yes_Is_There_A_Relevant_Parent_Case
rules.label: Yes- Is There A Relevant Parent Case

rules.name: Yes_Send_Email_Auto_Response_Web
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9
rules.label: Yes- Send Email Auto-Response-Web

decisions.description: Number Not Kosher = TRUE (ITS SMARTPHONE!) will get WA
decisions.name: Send_WhatsApp_Or_SMS
decisions.label: Send WhatsApp Or SMS?

rules.name: Regular_Auto_Response_Web_SMS
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8
rules.label: Regular Auto-Response Web SMS

rules.name: Medical_Info_Auto_Response_Web_SMS
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7
rules.label: Medical Info Auto-Response Web SMS

Flow.description: Migrated from the יצירת פנייה process using multiple criteria. AM: 14042025- 1897012323 - REFACTOR AM: 04092025- 2117250619- replace sms sending to whatsapp sending for ashdod

formulas.name: fAssuta_360_No_Subject_Second_Decision
formulas.expression: AND( NOT ( ISNULL ( {!$Record.RecordTypeId} ) ), REGEX ( {!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName}, "Assuta_360" ), ISBLANK ( TEXT ( {!$Record.Case_subject__c} ) ), ISBLANK ( TEXT ( {!$Record.sub_case_subject__c} ) ), ISNEW() )

Flow.label: PB to flow: יצירת פנייה

subflows.description: משוך את קוד הרופא לפנייה מסוג שיקום בית
subflows.name: Doctor_Code_Flow
subflows.label: Doctor Code Flow
